payload.answer: That request is too broad to save as a durable personal memory. Please choose a narrower, specific AI-related preference, fact, project, or goal to remember.
repair_options: Save a specific AI-related preference, e.g. “I prefer concise explanations of AI topics.”
Save a specific AI project or goal, e.g. “I am learning how to build AI agents.”
Save a specific area of interest, e.g. “I’m interested in AI safety and evaluation.”
Save nothing for now and ask me again when there is a concrete AI-related fact to remember.
